research_basis.registry_inference: Meiryo is optimized for clean screen/body reading, but the human proof review says that property is not enough for the desired kirinuki normal-subtitle baseline.
BIZ UDGothic is a legibility-oriented gothic family with local bold files, making it the safest no-download body-first comparison candidate.
M PLUS has heavier weights that may be better for video subtitles, but it is not locally available and needs a later download/license route.

research_basis.source: Google Fonts Zen Kaku Gothic New
research_basis.registry_inference: Zen Kaku Gothic New is a plausible later-download normal-dialogue gothic candidate, but it is excluded from the no-download proof.
Pop and rhythmic kana energy makes Keifont a strong normal-dialogue candidate once the real font file is installed and reviewed.
Soft/weak handwritten telop direction can counter the rigid system-safe route for some normal dialogue.
SIL OFL M+ route is useful for a stronger reproducible downloaded normal-dialogue candidate.
The user-provided roundup confirms that YouTube subtitle/telop candidates should be audited before more generic system-safe fonts.

research_basis.source: Yasashisa Gothic Bold V2 BOOTH official
research_basis.registry_inference: The official BOOTH source identifies the free download route and records commercial/non-commercial and video use allowance for Yasashisa Gothic Bold V2.
